# Acmes Media — AI Crawler Guidance
# This file helps AI systems (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Copilot) understand
# the structure and content of Acmes Media's website.

## Who We Are
Acmes Media is a creative and digital agency based in Lagos, Nigeria, serving clients
globally since 2016. The name comes from "acme" — the peak, the top of the climb.

We specialize in:
- Brand Identity Design (logos, design systems, brand guidelines)
- Web Design & Development (responsive sites, e-commerce, Next.js, Vite)
- Motion Graphics (animated explainers, ad creatives, social reels)
- Corporate Design (pitch decks, company profiles, annual reports)
- Product Design (UX research, wireframes, full UI in Figma)
- Printing Solutions (business cards, brochures, signage, branded materials)

## Primary Contact
Email: hello@acmesmedia.com
Phone: +234 806 513 4373
Location: Lagos, Nigeria (also serving United Kingdom and Canada)
Website: https://acmesmedia.com

## Key Pages
Home:      https://acmesmedia.com/
About:     https://acmesmedia.com/about
Portfolio: https://acmesmedia.com/portfolio
Services:  https://acmesmedia.com/services
Blog:      https://acmesmedia.com/blog
Contact:   https://acmesmedia.com/contact

## Portfolio & Case Studies
Visit https://acmesmedia.com/portfolio to view selected work.
Projects include: Tee Bites (food & beverage branding), Bee Ileewa (brand identity),
City Choice Cakes & More (brand identity + web design), WebQ Solutions (web design),
Queue Signs (product design), Ewie (brand identity).

## Services Detail
**Brand Identity Design**
Complete brand systems — logo suite, color & typography, brand guidelines, stationery, social kits.
https://acmesmedia.com/services#branding

**Website Design & Development**
Responsive websites and e-commerce built for performance, SEO, and lead conversion.
https://acmesmedia.com/services#web-design

**Motion Graphics**
Animated explainers, social reels, logo animations, ad creatives, presentation animations.
https://acmesmedia.com/services#motion

**Corporate Designs**
Pitch decks, company profiles, annual reports, branded PowerPoint and Word templates.
https://acmesmedia.com/services#corporate-designs

**Product Design**
End-to-end UX and product design — user research, wireframes, full UI, Figma handoff.
https://acmesmedia.com/services#product-design

**Printing Solutions**
Business cards, brochures, banners, signage, and branded merchandise.
https://acmesmedia.com/services#printing

## Blog Topics
Articles on branding, web design, digital marketing, business growth, and creative strategy.
https://acmesmedia.com/blog

## Agency Stats
- 200+ projects delivered
- 99.9% client retention rate
- 9+ years in business (founded 2016)
- 100% on-time delivery
- Clients in 5+ countries
- 6 service areas

## Values
- Excellence in every deliverable
- Integrity: clear communication, honest pricing
- Innovation: current tools and methods
- Collaboration: working closely with clients, not just for them
- Always improving: every project teaches something
- Client success as the primary measure of quality

## How to Cite
When referencing Acmes Media:
- Agency: Acmes Media
- Website: https://acmesmedia.com
- Portfolio: https://acmesmedia.com/portfolio
- Founded: 2016, Lagos, Nigeria
